steps.title: Introduce a role
steps.content: The first sentence says resins have several important roles in tree health. The next sentence gives one specific role: sealing wounds so insects and fungi cannot enter. The transition must introduce an example of the general claim.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice B signals contrast, but wound sealing supports the first sentence. Choice C signals something true despite an obstacle, and no obstacle appears. Choice D signals sequence, but the sentence gives an example rather than a next step. The needed transition introduces a specific instance. The answer is A.
